title: Support - Device page with headset disconnected
scenario: User navigates to Support section, taps on a previously disconnected headset visible on Home Screen, and expects a device details modal to slide up from the bottom.
steps: Ensure a previously disconnected headset is visible on the Home Screen
expected: A modal slides up from the bottom of the screen displaying device details (Device Name, Device Product ID, Serial Number, Software Version, Headset Revision, Last Connected) along with instructions to send detailed information to Support, and a "Go" button.
